title: Meet the team: Christine Watts
caption:
MEET THE TEAM 🇺🇸

Christine Watts — Defense
🎓 William & Mary '13 (Tribe field hockey)
📍 Williamsburg, VA → Atlanta, GA

Four-year Tribe defender who started every match as a junior, three-time NFHCA All-Academic pick — and now President of the Georgia Field Hockey Association.

Follow the road to Schiedam: usamastersfh.com
